label: Gang-Controlled Capital
contestNote: Government disputes exact figures; some analysts cite 85%
deltaNote: Up from ~60% in 2021; 26 gangs active in capital area

label: Internally Displaced Persons
deltaNote: Up 40% since end of 2024; Jean-Denis massacre (Mar 30) added ~6,000 newly displaced

label: Need Humanitarian Assistance
deltaNote: More than half the population; 600K in famine conditions

label: Killed (Mar 2025–Jan 2026)
contestNote: Security forces killed 3,497 — more than twice the 1,424 killed directly by gangs
deltaNote: 247 documented police summary executions; true toll likely higher

label: GSF Personnel Deployed
deltaNote: El Salvador advance contingent only; full 5,550-person force expected mid-2026

label: Active Gangs Nationwide
deltaNote: 26 in capital area; Viv Ansanm coalition designated US FTO

label: In IPC Phase 5 (Catastrophe)
deltaNote: Up from 8,400 in 2024; concentrated in IDP displacement camps

label: Remittances (% of GDP)
deltaNote: Down from 19% in 2023; lifeline for 3M+ families

label: Children with Acute Malnutrition
deltaNote: 125,000 with severe acute malnutrition; 2.6M children need humanitarian aid
